name: TaarYa Evaluation Benchmark
description: Comprehensive benchmark suite for TaarYa astronomical retrieval system

queries.query: Find all stars in the Pleiades open cluster
queries.ground_truth_notes: Pleiades (M45) is a well-studied open cluster with ~1000 members

queries.query: Find all stars in the Hyades moving group
queries.ground_truth_notes: Hyades is the nearest open cluster at ~45pc

queries.query: Find stars in the Orion OB1 association
queries.ground_truth_notes: Orion OB1 is a large association, query captures central part

queries.query: Find stars near Sirius (RA=101.29, Dec=-16.72)
queries.ground_truth_notes: Sirius is a bright star, nearby stars should be few

queries.query: Find stars near Betelgeuse (RA=88.79, Dec=7.41)
queries.ground_truth_notes: Betelgeuse is a red supergiant in Orion

queries.query: Find the densest region near the galactic center
queries.ground_truth_notes: Toward galactic center, high density of stars expected

queries.query: Find stars in a quiet sky region away from the plane
queries.ground_truth_notes: High galactic latitude should have fewer stars

queries.query: Find stars with very high proper motion indicating possible nearby objects
queries.ground_truth_notes: High proper motion stars are rare and scientifically interesting

queries.query: Find stars with unusually high RUWE values indicating possible binarity
queries.ground_truth_notes: RUWE > 2.0 suggests astrometric binary

queries.query: Find extremely blue stars (BP-RP < -0.1)
queries.ground_truth_notes: Blue objects may be blue stragglers or hot subdwarfs

queries.query: Find extremely red stars (BP-RP > 2.8)
queries.ground_truth_notes: Red objects may be M-dwarfs or dusty envelopes

queries.query: Find bright but distant stars suggesting overluminous objects
queries.ground_truth_notes: Bright+distant = unusual luminosity or errors

queries.query: Find stars that appear in multiple catalogs
queries.ground_truth_notes: Cross-matched stars are likely well-studied

queries.query: Compare stellar density in Pleiades vs Hyades
queries.ground_truth_notes: Compare number of stars per unit area

queries.query: Find all papers discussing the Hyades cluster
queries.ground_truth_notes: Hyades is one of the most studied clusters

queries.query: Find all papers about the Pleiades
queries.ground_truth_notes: Pleiades has extensive literature

queries.query: Find papers about stellar kinematics and proper motions
queries.ground_truth_notes: Gaia enables precise proper motion studies

queries.query: Find Hyades members and related literature
queries.ground_truth_notes: Combined spatial + semantic query

queries.query: Find Pleiades members with literature context
queries.ground_truth_notes: Hybrid spatial-literature query

queries.query: Find stars near the north celestial pole
queries.ground_truth_notes: Special coordinate case

queries.query: Find stars near the ecliptic plane at RA=180
queries.ground_truth_notes: Ecliptic plane has moderate star density

queries.query: Find literature about variable stars in open clusters

params.topic: variable stars RR Lyrae Cepheid open clusters

queries.ground_truth_notes: Time-domain astronomy is active field

queries.query: Find papers about transient events and stellar explosions
queries.ground_truth_notes: Transient research is major topic

queries.query: Find literature about Milky Way disk kinematics

params.topic: Milky Way disk stellar kinematics rotation

queries.ground_truth_notes: Gaia revolutionized galactic structure studies

queries.query: Find papers about exoplanet atmosphere spectroscopy
queries.ground_truth_notes: JWST is revolutionizing exoplanet studies

queries.query: Find papers about brown dwarf spectral classification

params.topic: brown dwarf spectral classification L dwarf M dwarf

queries.ground_truth_notes: Brown dwarfs bridge planets and stars

queries.query: Find candidate binary stars in the solar neighborhood
queries.ground_truth_notes: Nearby binaries are key for mass measurements

queries.query: Find candidate young stellar objects near known star-forming regions
queries.ground_truth_notes: YSOs have blue colors from accretion

queries.query: Find papers connecting Gaia astrometry to radio astronomy
queries.ground_truth_notes: Multi-wavelength astrometry is emerging field

queries.query: Find standard candles (Cepheids, RR Lyrae) mentioned in literature

params.topic: Cepheid RR Lyrae period luminosity distance ladder

queries.ground_truth_notes: Standard candles enable cosmic distance scale

queries.query: Find hypervelocity stars or unusual kinematic populations
queries.ground_truth_notes: Hypervelocity stars are extremely rare

queries.query: Find white dwarfs in the solar neighborhood
queries.ground_truth_notes: White dwarfs are cool and faint

queries.query: Find star clusters in the Magellanic Clouds
queries.ground_truth_notes: LMC/SMC are satellite galaxies

queries.query: Compare literature coverage of globular vs open clusters
queries.ground_truth_notes: Both have extensive literature but different focus

queries.query: Find literature about binary star formation

params.topic: binary star formation multiple star systems

queries.ground_truth_notes: Binary fraction is key stellar property
